textByHash.e98a6d08726ca9e043e00a91af641c3f2310cdbc: It wasn't just me who got drunk. You looked like you were about to puke all over the barmaid.
textByHash.bca3a63bda7999ecb2afe1b7194da587602e84bc: If your father listened to what you say, we wouldn't BE here.
textByHash.1687263c24f62822aa93463c974dba32c80d965a: We'd have passed the trials and we'd be proper adults!
textByHash.e5a4862d2edef145dd209369c6f744b53f39392d: Just act normal, Armod! And hurry!
textByHash.2f55266dc440b324619139e48b9d8d37c2bf5c14: So you're the adventurer we heard about, then. The one who married the prince.
textByHash.a9e17c523f730b7e27053063aff56d3e500ffacd: So you're the adventurer we heard about, then. The one who married the princess.
textByHash.96f3cc662742999845729393f9e15576ad703221: So you're the adventurer we heard about, then. The one who gained the trust of the prince.
textByHash.040085723f2b9f88600022fd557a09e179641b5e: So you're the adventurer we heard about, then. The one who gained the trust of the princess.
textByHash.aa6b2b26b73929b985d593b1b2480e006339b9f6: Not after we got drunk and then didn't pay our bill.
textByHash.54da4e8f99017b26452ec3ac7d2ef976a79b6beb: We didn't mean it to go wrong, you know...
